description: The fila Figio shoe is fila's reinterpretation of the classic sneaker. The brand comes up with yet another sleek and stylish low-top pair with this shoe. With minimal overlays, this shoe nails the simplistic mood of the moment. Wear this with tonal tees and classic denims.UpperSynthetic upper upper for lightweight comfort and absolute breathabilityPerforations on the midfoot and stitch detail on the toe regionSynthetic overlays strategically placed for added shoe structureLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded and meshed tongue and collar for snug, all-day comfortPadded mesh inner for breathable comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and absolute shock absorption with double foxingOutsoleTextured and grooved TPR outsole for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
